sections.heading: See Your Personalized 4.2x Formula
sections.description: 30-minute strategy session. We analyze your funnel, show you exactly where money is leaking, and reveal the quick wins. Spots limited to 5 per week.

items.question: How long until we see 4.2x ROAS?
items.answer: Average of 90 days. Some see 2-3x in month 1. It depends on your starting point and budget.

items.question: What makes your creatives different?
items.answer: We use the same framework across all winners. Strategic positioning + emotional copywriting + data-driven design. It works because it's proven.

items.question: Why only 5 spots per week?
items.answer: We're extremely selective about new clients to maintain quality. We only work with brands committed to scaling.
